memories.content: Security audit (March 2026): Found SQL injection in handler.rs process_payment() — user_id directly interpolated into query. Ticket VULN-142 opened, status UNRESOLVED. Also found missing rate limiting on /api/v1/payment endpoint. Recommended parameterized queries and rate-limit middleware.
PCI DSS compliance review (Q1 2026): Payment token encryption key stored in source code (secrets.rs). Flagged as PCI DSS Requirement 3.4 violation. Must move to HSM or KMS before Q2 audit deadline.

This codebase uses format!() for SQL queries extensively. Previous fix attempt in February replaced one query but missed get_history(). Pattern to watch: any function taking user_id: &str and building SQL with it.
